text: The Mohamed Sathak A.J. College of Engineering (MSAJCE), established on 5th July 2001 under the aegis of Mohamed Sathak Trust, is approved by AICTE New Delhi, affiliated to Anna University Chennai and Government of Tamil Nadu. MSAJCE strives to continuously upgrade its facilities to provide quality technical education to meet the industrial and societal needs.

The college campus, sprawling over 70 acres of greenery, is located inside the SIPCOT IT Park, Siruseri, and is surrounded by multinational IT companies. MSAJCE has good infrastructure facilities such as spacious classrooms, laboratories, seminar halls, computer facilities with internet and wifi connectivity, library, workshops, auditorium, and playground.

MSAJCE provides all kinds of training for the professional and overall transformation of the students. A team of well-qualified and experienced faculty supports the teaching and learning process. The college gives equal importance to academic, co-curricular, and extracurricular activities.

Key benefits for students choosing MSAJCE include its location in a lush environment next to leading IT industries, state-of-the-art facilities, qualified faculty, involvement in research and projects, internship opportunities, and a good placement record.
To be an eminent institute for higher education and research through innovative teaching-learning and sustainable practices to meet the industrial and societal needs.
To impart quality technical education by transforming students into professionally competent technocrats, nurturing all-round sustainable development, and instilling values.
MSAJCE is committed to creating quality professionals through innovative teaching, research, industrial relations, and nurturing human values and ethics based on continual improvement.

Mohamed Sathak Trust, established on 26 October 1973, aims to help deprived people from rural backgrounds obtain quality education. The Trust has 18 educational institutions and focuses on providing academic excellence.
The Trust's guiding philosophy emphasizes that 'God will not change the condition of a people until they try to change themselves,' promoting charitable actions without bias.

metadata.topic: Founding Philosophy of Mohammed Sathak Trust

text: The Chairman emphasizes the importance of choosing the right institute for higher studies, highlighting MSAJCE's dedication to student success and state-of-the-art facilities.
The Principal, Dr. K.S. Srinivasan, expresses commitment to providing a well-rounded education with a focus on holistic development and preparing students for Industry 4.0 challenges.
